sub_modules.fir_input_cast: Combinational signed interpretation of the input sample bus.
sub_modules.fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM for the exact 101 signed Q15 band-pass FIR coefficients.
sub_modules.fir_tap_multiply: Combinational signed sample-by-coefficient multiplier for one FIR tap.
sub_modules.fir_accumulator_101: Combinational 64-bit signed accumulator for all 101 tap products.
sub_modules.fir_q15_normalize: Combinational arithmetic right shift by 15 to convert the Q15 accumulator result to output scale.
